verdict_summary: DONE confirmed (24-day staleness check passed). Korean warning '차단' rendered, RRN absent in response. APF S2 functional on blackbox.ai.

evidence.warning_text_quote: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.
evidence.answer_area_state: Response rendered as raw JSON envelope: {"response":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.\n\nThis request has been blocked due to sensitive information detected.","status":"blocked"}. Warning text and Korean '차단' keyword visible in the chat answer area. No model output beyond the blocked envelope (no RRN interpretation, no birthdate decoding, no gender inference).
evidence.console_errors_excerpt: Pre-existing baseline only: 'An error occurred while retrieving token. Retrying...' (4990-90bf8cc46165c3e8.js:1) and CORS block on https://ipapi.co/json/ (geo-IP, unrelated to APF). No new errors after prompt submission. 7 errors / 9 info / 23 verbose / 0 warnings — counts consistent with baseline.
evidence.url_after_submit: https://app.blackbox.ai/ (auto-redirected from www.blackbox.ai → GET STARTED → app subdomain; no chat-id appended in URL bar)

recommendation: Keep blackbox in DONE bucket. Next staleness re-check ~30 days out (2026-06-10). H4d engine (run_id 20260511-110536-39785) confirmed enforcing on blackbox path.
notes: Test PC Chrome session. Flow: navigate www.blackbox.ai → landing page → click GET STARTED → app.blackbox.ai chat (no auth required) → Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload → F12 DevTools Console → submit PII prompt → 15s wait → response rendered. Response is shown as raw JSON envelope (status:blocked) directly in the chat answer area rather than styled bubble — consistent with backend block path returning JSON before chat-stream rendering. Korean '차단' keyword present (expected_text matched). RRN '880101-1234567' echoed only in user-prompt bubble (input echo, not decoded model output). No regression vs 2026-04-17 baseline.
